---
title: "Pawan Jangra | Data Analyst & Economic Researcher"
description: "7+ years translating complex survey data into policy-relevant insights — specialising in Indian agricultural, labour, and economic policy."
author: "Pawan Jangra"
date: today
image: assets/pawan-avatar.png

# ── Quarto website config (also set in _quarto.yml) ──────────────
website:
  title: "Pawan Jangra"
  favicon: "assets/favicon.ico"
  navbar:
    pinned: true
    logo: "assets/logo.svg"
    left:
      - text: "About"
        href: "#about"
      - text: "Experience"
        href: "#experience"
      - text: "Data Visualizations"
        href: "#data_viz"
      - text: "Skills"
        href: "#skills"
      - text: "R & Quarto"
        href: "#quarto"
      - text: "Blog"
        href: "#blog"
      - text: "Editor"
        href: "#editor-section"
      - text: "R Code"
        href: "#r-section"
    right:
      - text: "Contact"
        href: "#contact"
        aria-label: "Hire Me"
    tools:
      - icon: github
        href: "https://github.com/pawan1198"
        aria-label: "GitHub"
      - icon: linkedin
        href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/pawanjangra1198/"
        aria-label: "LinkedIn"

format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, custom.scss]   # custom.scss holds all brand CSS
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    include-before-body:
      - text: |
          <div id="progress"></div>
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <button id="backtop" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" aria-label="Back to top">↑</button>

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     INLINE STYLES  — brand tokens + layout
     (extracted from the original HTML <style> block)
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<style>
/* ── DESIGN TOKENS ─────────────────────────────────── */
:root {
  --navy:       #0d1b2a;
  --navy2:      #1a2e45;
  --teal:       #1d9e75;
  --teal-light: #e1f5ee;
  --amber:      #ba7517;
  --amber-light:#faeeda;
  --coral:      #d85a30;
  --slate:      #4a5568;
  --light:      #f7f8fc;
  --white:      #ffffff;
  --border:     #e2e8f0;
  --text:       #1a202c;
  --muted:      #718096;
  --font-head:  'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  --font-body:  'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono:  'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
  --radius:     12px;
  --shadow:     0 4px 24px rgba(13,27,42,.10);
}
/* ── RESET ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px;}
body{font-family:var(--font-body);color:var(--text);background:var(--light);line-height:1.7;}
/* ── SCROLL PROGRESS ───────────────────────────────── */
#progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:3px;background:var(--teal);z-index:9999;transition:width .1s;}
/* ── BACK TO TOP ────────────────────────────────────── */
#backtop{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal);color:#fff;border:none;font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(29,158,117,.4);transition:transform .2s;}
#backtop:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);}
#backtop.visible{display:flex;}
/* ── HERO ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
#hero{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 60%,var(--navy2) 100%);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding-top:64px;}
.hero-grid{background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(29,158,117,.15) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:32px 32px;position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;}
.hero-content{max-width:860px;margin:auto;padding:4rem 2rem;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-block;background:rgba(29,158,117,.18);border:1px solid rgba(29,158,117,.35);color:#5dcaa5;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.35rem .9rem;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.hero-content h1{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:clamp(2.4rem,6vw,4.2rem);color:#fff;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1rem;font-weight:700;}
.hero-content h1 em{color:var(--teal);font-style:normal;}
.hero-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);font-size:1.15rem;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;font-weight:300;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;padding:.75rem 1.75rem;border-radius:8px;font-weight:500;font-size:.92rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer;border:none;}
.btn-primary{background:var(--teal);color:#fff;}
.btn-primary:hover{background:#17856a;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);}
.btn-outline:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;justify-content:center;margin-top:3.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.stat{text-align:center;}
.stat-num{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:2.4rem;color:#fff;line-height:1;}
.stat-label{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:.25rem;}
/* ── SECTIONS ──────────────────────────────────────── */
section{padding:6rem 2rem;}
.container{max-width:1100px;margin:auto;}
.section-label{display:block;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:.75rem;}
.section-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:clamp(1.9rem,4vw,2.8rem);color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.2;}
.section-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:1.05rem;max-width:580px;margin-bottom:3.5rem;}
/* ── ABOUT ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
#about{background:#fff;}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start;}
.avatar-card{background:var(--navy);border-radius:20px;padding:2.5rem;color:#fff;text-align:center;}
.avatar-circle{width:90px;height:90px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:2.2rem;color:#fff;margin:0 auto 1.2rem;font-weight:700;}
.avatar-card h3{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;}
.avatar-card p{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.contact-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;}
.contact-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;padding:.5rem .75rem;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);transition:background .2s;}
.contact-link:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:#fff;}
.about-text p{color:var(--slate);margin-bottom:1.2rem;font-size:.97rem;line-height:1.8;}
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.75rem;margin-top:2rem;}
.skill-item{background:var(--light);border-radius:10px;padding:.9rem 1rem;}
.skill-name{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.skill-bar{background:var(--border);border-radius:20px;height:5px;}
.skill-fill{height:5px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--teal);transition:width 1s ease;}
/* ── TIMELINE ──────────────────────────────────────── */
#experience{background:var(--light);}
.timeline{position:relative;padding-left:2rem;}
.timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:2px;background:var(--border);}
.tl-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:2.5rem;padding-left:2rem;}
.tl-dot{position:absolute;left:-2.55rem;top:6px;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal);border:3px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--teal);}
.tl-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.5rem 1.75rem;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.05);}
.tl-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;}
.tl-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600;}
.tl-org{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--teal);}
.tl-date{font-size:.78rem;background:var(--teal-light);color:var(--teal);padding:.25rem .75rem;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;}
.tl-list{list-style:none;margin-top:.75rem;}
.tl-list li{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--slate);padding:.3rem 0 .3rem 1.2rem;position:relative;}
.tl-list li::before{content:'→';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--teal);font-size:.8rem;}
/* ── SKILLS CARDS ───────────────────────────────────── */
#skills{background:#fff;}
.skills-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;}
.skill-card{background:var(--light);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.skill-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.skill-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.skill-card h3{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.skill-card p{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.skill-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1rem;}
.tag{font-size:.75rem;background:var(--navy);color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);padding:.2rem .65rem;border-radius:20px;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.tag.green{background:var(--teal-light);color:var(--teal);}
.tag.amber{background:var(--amber-light);color:var(--amber);}
/* ── QUARTO/R ───────────────────────────────────────── */
#quarto{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:5rem 2rem;}
#quarto .section-title{color:#fff;}
#quarto .section-desc{color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
#quarto .section-label{color:#5dcaa5;}
.quarto-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;margin-top:3rem;}
.q-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem;transition:background .2s;}
.q-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.q-card h3{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.1rem;color:#fff;margin-bottom:.6rem;}
.q-card p{font-size:.88rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);line-height:1.7;}
.code-block{background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;margin-top:1rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.8rem;color:#5dcaa5;overflow-x:auto;line-height:1.6;position:relative;}
.code-block .comment{color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);}
.code-block .keyword{color:#fac775;}
.code-block .string{color:#97c459;}
.copy-btn{position:absolute;top:.75rem;right:.75rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;font-size:.72rem;padding:.25rem .6rem;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;}
.copy-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);}
/* ── BLOG ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
#blog{background:var(--light);}
.blog-controls{display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
.blog-filter{padding:.4rem 1rem;border-radius:20px;font-size:.83rem;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:var(--text);}
.blog-filter.active,.blog-filter:hover{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;border-color:var(--navy);}
.blog-search{flex:1;min-width:200px;max-width:320px;padding:.5rem 1rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.9rem;outline:none;}
.blog-search:focus{border-color:var(--teal);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(29,158,117,.1);}
.blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:1.75rem;}
.blog-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;cursor:pointer;}
.blog-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.blog-card-top{height:5px;}
.blog-card-top.economics{background:var(--teal);}
.blog-card-top.data{background:var(--amber);}
.blog-card-top.r{background:#7f77dd;}
.blog-body{padding:1.5rem;}
.blog-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;}
.blog-cat{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:4px;}
.blog-cat.economics{background:var(--teal-light);color:var(--teal);}
.blog-cat.data{background:var(--amber-light);color:var(--amber);}
.blog-cat.r{background:#eeedfe;color:#534ab7;}
.blog-date{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);}
.blog-card h3{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.4;}
.blog-card p{font-size:.87rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;}
.blog-readmore{display:inline-block;margin-top:1rem;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--teal);font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;}
/* ── MARKDOWN EDITOR ────────────────────────────────── */
#editor-section{background:#fff;}
.editor-wrapper{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;height:520px;}
.editor-pane,.preview-pane{display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;}
.pane-header{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:.6rem 1rem;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;}
.pane-btn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:none;color:#fff;font-size:.75rem;padding:.25rem .65rem;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;}
.pane-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.22);}
#md-editor{flex:1;border:none;resize:none;padding:1.2rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.7;outline:none;color:var(--text);}
#md-preview{flex:1;padding:1.2rem;overflow-y:auto;font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.8;}
#md-preview h1,#md-preview h2,#md-preview h3{font-family:var(--font-head);color:var(--navy);margin:.75rem 0 .4rem;}
#md-preview h1{font-size:1.7rem;}#md-preview h2{font-size:1.35rem;}#md-preview h3{font-size:1.1rem;}
#md-preview p{margin-bottom:.85rem;color:var(--slate);}
#md-preview code{font-family:var(--font-mono);background:var(--light);padding:.1rem .4rem;border-radius:4px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--coral);}
#md-preview pre{background:var(--navy);color:#5dcaa5;padding:1rem 1.2rem;border-radius:8px;overflow-x:auto;margin:.75rem 0;}
#md-preview pre code{background:none;color:inherit;padding:0;}
#md-preview blockquote{border-left:3px solid var(--teal);padding:.5rem 1rem;color:var(--muted);background:var(--teal-light);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;margin:.75rem 0;}
#md-preview ul,#md-preview ol{padding-left:1.5rem;color:var(--slate);margin-bottom:.85rem;}
#md-preview table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.88rem;}
#md-preview th{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:.5rem .75rem;text-align:left;}
#md-preview td{border:1px solid var(--border);padding:.45rem .75rem;}
#md-preview tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--light);}
.editor-actions{display:flex;gap:.75rem;margin-top:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
/* ── R CODE TABS ────────────────────────────────────── */
#r-section{background:var(--light);}
.r-tabs{display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.r-tab{padding:.45rem 1.1rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:var(--text);}
.r-tab.active{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;border-color:var(--navy);}
.r-panel{display:none;}
.r-panel.active{display:block;}
.r-code{background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.5rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.82rem;color:#a5f3d0;line-height:1.75;overflow-x:auto;position:relative;}
.r-code .kw{color:#fac775;}
.r-code .fn{color:#85b7eb;}
.r-code .str{color:#97c459;}
.r-code .cm{color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);}
.r-code .num{color:#f7c1c1;}
.r-desc{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;margin-top:1rem;}
.r-desc p{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted);}
.r-desc strong{color:var(--navy);}
/* ── CONTACT ────────────────────────────────────────── */
#contact{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;}
#contact .section-title{color:#fff;}
#contact .section-label{color:#5dcaa5;}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;align-items:start;margin-top:3rem;}
.contact-info p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:2rem;}
.c-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.85rem;}
.c-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none;padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);transition:all .2s;}
.c-link:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;}
.c-link-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--teal);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.c-link-text{font-size:.88rem;}
.c-link-sub{display:block;font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);}
.contact-form{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;}
.form-group{margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.form-group label{display:block;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.form-group input,.form-group textarea,.form-group select{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:8px;padding:.7rem 1rem;color:#fff;font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.9rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus,.form-group select:focus{border-color:var(--teal);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(29,158,117,.15);}
.form-group textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:120px;}
.form-group select option{background:var(--navy2);color:#fff;}
.form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;}
#form-msg{display:none;margin-top:.75rem;padding:.6rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.87rem;}
#form-msg.success{background:rgba(29,158,117,.2);color:#5dcaa5;border:1px solid rgba(29,158,117,.3);}
/* ── MODAL ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);z-index:2000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:1.5rem;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .2s;}
.modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
.modal{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;max-width:700px;width:100%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.modal-header{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:1.5rem 2rem;border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.modal-header h2{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.3rem;}
.modal-close{background:none;border:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:1.4rem;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;}
.modal-body{padding:2rem;}
.modal-body h3{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--navy);margin:1.25rem 0 .5rem;}
.modal-body p{font-size:.92rem;color:var(--slate);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.75rem;}
.modal-body ul{padding-left:1.4rem;color:var(--slate);font-size:.9rem;}
.modal-body ul li{margin-bottom:.35rem;}
.modal-actions{display:flex;gap:.75rem;padding:1.25rem 2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
/* ── FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.site-footer{background:#070f17;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-align:center;padding:2rem;font-size:.83rem;}
.site-footer a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);text-decoration:none;}
.site-footer a:hover{color:#fff;}
/* ── ANIMATIONS ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.fade-in{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease;}
.fade-in.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}
/* ── RESPONSIVE ──────────────────────────────────────── */
@media(max-width:900px){
  .about-grid,.quarto-grid,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .editor-wrapper{grid-template-columns:1fr;height:auto;}
  .editor-pane{height:300px;}
  .preview-pane{min-height:300px;}
  .form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
@media(max-width:700px){
  section{padding:4rem 1.25rem;}
  .hero-content{padding:3rem 1.25rem;}
  .hero-stats{gap:1.5rem;}
}
/* ── QUARTO NAVBAR OVERRIDE ───────────────────────────── */
.navbar{background:rgba(13,27,42,.96)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);}
.navbar-brand,.nav-link{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)!important;}
.navbar-brand{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.25rem;}
.nav-link:hover{color:#fff!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:6px;}
/* hide default Quarto TOC on this full-page layout */
#TOC,#quarto-margin-sidebar{display:none!important;}
#quarto-document-content{margin:0;padding:0;max-width:100%;}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §1  HERO
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-content fade-in visible">
    <div class="hero-badge">Open to Research Collaborations</div>
    <h1>Pawan Jangra<br/><em>Data Analyst &amp; Economic Researcher</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      7+ years translating complex survey data into policy-relevant insights —
      specialising in Indian agricultural, labour, and economic policy.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-primary">Hire Me</a>
      <a href="#blog"    class="btn btn-outline">Read My Work</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">7+</div><div class="stat-label">Years Experience</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">3</div><div class="stat-label">Research Orgs</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">R</div><div class="stat-label">Primary Language</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">∞</div><div class="stat-label">Curiosity</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §2  ABOUT
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">

      <!-- Avatar card -->
      <div class="avatar-block fade-in">
        <div class="avatar-card">
          <div class="avatar-circle">PJ</div>
          <h3>Pawan Jangra</h3>
          <p>New Delhi, India</p>
          <div class="contact-links">
            <a href="https://github.com/pawan1198" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="contact-link">
              <span>⌥</span> github.com/pawan1198
            </a>
            <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pawanjangra1198/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="contact-link">
              <span>in</span> LinkedIn
            </a>
            <a href="mailto:pawanjangra1198@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
              <span>@</span> pawanjangra1198@gmail.com
            </a>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
            <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;">Get in Touch</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Bio + skill bars -->
      <div class="fade-in">
        <span class="section-label">About Me</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Data meets Policy</h2>
        <div class="about-text">
          <p>I'm a data analyst and field researcher with over 7 years of experience in survey
             methodology, statistical analysis, and research coordination across India.
             My work sits at the intersection of <strong>economics, statistics, and data science</strong>.</p>
          <p>I specialise in translating complex survey data — from PLFS, NSS, and government
             microdata — into clear insights that inform agricultural, labour, and fiscal policy research.</p>
          <p>My toolkit centres on <strong>R</strong> (tidyverse, ggplot2, data.table, Quarto), Python,
             and reproducible research workflows. I enjoy building interactive dashboards with Shiny
             and publishing analytical narratives via Quarto.</p>
          <p><em>Available for research collaborations, data analysis consulting, and academic support.</em></p>
        </div>
        <div class="skills-grid">
          <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-name">R / Tidyverse</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:93%" data-w="93"></div></div></div>
          <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-name">Python / Pandas</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:78%" data-w="78"></div></div></div>
          <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-name">Quarto / RMarkdown</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:88%" data-w="88"></div></div></div>
          <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-name">Survey / ODK</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:90%" data-w="90"></div></div></div>
          <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-name">Linux / Bash</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:72%" data-w="72"></div></div></div>
          <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-name">Web Scraping</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:75%" data-w="75"></div></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §3  EXPERIENCE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="experience">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">Career</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Professional Experience</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Field research, academic support, and data analysis across leading Indian research institutions.</p>

    <div class="timeline fade-in">

      <!-- Role 1 -->
      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-card">
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <div>
              <div class="tl-title">Field Surveyor</div>
              <div class="tl-org">OP Jindal Global University</div>
            </div>
            <span class="tl-date">Mar 2025 – May 2025</span>
          </div>
          <ul class="tl-list">
            <li>Participated in field surveys for the Health Financing Research Study in Haryana</li>
            <li>Collected and managed survey data using ODK (Open Data Kit) software</li>
            <li>Contributed to health economics research through systematic data collection</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Role 2 -->
      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-card">
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <div>
              <div class="tl-title">Course Assistant</div>
              <div class="tl-org">IDEAs Advanced Certificate Programme on Research in Political Economy</div>
            </div>
            <span class="tl-date">2022 – 2024</span>
          </div>
          <ul class="tl-list">
            <li>Survey Field Assistant: supported operations across multiple regions in India</li>
            <li>Technical Assistant: managed hybrid classroom setups via Zoom and OBS Studio</li>
            <li>Office Assistant: coordinated logistics, accounts, and consumables</li>
            <li>Assisted renowned economists from global institutions during lecture sessions</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Role 3 -->
      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-card">
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <div>
              <div class="tl-title">Research Assistant</div>
              <div class="tl-org">Society for Social and Economic Research (SSER), New Delhi</div>
            </div>
            <span class="tl-date">2018 – 2022</span>
          </div>
          <ul class="tl-list">
            <li>Survey Field Investigator: conducted comprehensive door-to-door surveys</li>
            <li>Data Manager: organised and streamlined survey materials and collection processes</li>
            <li>Data Analyst: statistical analysis in R and Python — Union Budget, PLFS, web scraping</li>
            <li>Collaborated with research teams to refine data collection methodologies</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §4  SKILLS
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">Capabilities</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Technical Skills</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">A full-stack research toolkit spanning programming, field methods, and data communication.</p>
    <div class="skills-cards fade-in">
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">📊</div>
        <h3>Statistical Programming</h3>
        <p>R with tidyverse, data.table, ggplot2, ggiraph, gt tables. Python with Pandas and NumPy.</p>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="tag">R</span><span class="tag">Python</span>
          <span class="tag">data.table</span><span class="tag green">ggplot2</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">📋</div>
        <h3>Reproducible Research</h3>
        <p>Quarto books, RMarkdown, fully documented workflows, LaTeX, Org-mode, and version control with Git.</p>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="tag">Quarto</span><span class="tag green">RMarkdown</span><span class="tag">Git</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">📈</div>
        <h3>Data Visualisation</h3>
        <p>Interactive charts with Plotly, Shiny dashboards, esquisse drag-and-drop, and GWalkR exploration.</p>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="tag">Shiny</span><span class="tag amber">Plotly</span>
          <span class="tag">esquisse</span><span class="tag green">GWalkR</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🗺️</div>
        <h3>Field Survey Methods</h3>
        <p>End-to-end survey design, ODK/Survey CTO data collection, CAPI, quality assurance, and CATI protocols.</p>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="tag">ODK</span><span class="tag green">SurveyCTO</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🌐</div>
        <h3>Web Scraping &amp; Automation</h3>
        <p>Python Selenium, rvest in R, Bash automation scripts for data pipeline tasks on Linux.</p>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="tag">Selenium</span><span class="tag green">rvest</span><span class="tag">Bash</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🏛️</div>
        <h3>Economic Data Analysis</h3>
        <p>PLFS, NSS, Union Budget, CMIE, and MOSPI datasets. Agricultural, labour, and fiscal analytics.</p>
        <div class="skill-tags">
          <span class="tag">PLFS</span><span class="tag amber">Budget Data</span><span class="tag">HHI</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §5  R & QUARTO ECOSYSTEM
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="quarto">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">R Ecosystem</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">R, Quarto &amp; Interactive Tools</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Building reproducible research pipelines and interactive exploration tools for Indian economic data.</p>
    <div class="quarto-grid fade-in">

      <div class="q-card">
        <h3>📦 Quarto Books &amp; Reports</h3>
        <p>Full Quarto book projects with custom SCSS themes, citation styles, and R code chunks.
           18-chapter statistics textbook currently in development.</p>
        <div class="code-block"><button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="comment"># _quarto.yml snippet</span>
book:
  title: <span class="string">"R for Statistical Analysis"</span>
  chapters:
    - index.qmd
    - chapters/descriptive.qmd
    - chapters/regression.qmd
  output-dir: <span class="string">_book</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="q-card">
        <h3>🎨 esquisse — Drag-and-Drop ggplot2</h3>
        <p>Use esquisse to interactively build ggplot2 charts — drag variables to aesthetics and export the R code.</p>
        <div class="code-block"><button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="keyword">library</span>(esquisse)
<span class="keyword">library</span>(ggplot2)
<span class="comment"># Launch interactive builder</span>
esquisser(mtcars)</div>
      </div>

      <div class="q-card">
        <h3>🚶 GWalkR — Tableau-like Exploration</h3>
        <p>GWalkR embeds a full Tableau-style drag-and-drop data explorer directly inside your R session or Shiny app.</p>
        <div class="code-block"><button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="keyword">library</span>(GWalkR)
<span class="comment"># Open explorer in RStudio Viewer</span>
gwalkr(your_dataframe)</div>
      </div>

      <div class="q-card">
        <h3>⚡ Shiny Dashboards</h3>
        <p>Interactive dashboards for PLFS labour market data, GST trends, edible oil prices, and agricultural analysis.</p>
        <div class="code-block"><button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="keyword">library</span>(shiny)
ui &lt;- fluidPage(
  selectInput(<span class="string">"state"</span>, <span class="string">"State:"</span>, states),
  plotOutput(<span class="string">"trend"</span>)
)</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §6  BLOG
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="blog">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">Writing</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Blog &amp; Analysis</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Data journalism and analytical articles on Indian economic policy, agriculture, and labour markets.</p>

    <div class="blog-controls">
      <input type="text" class="blog-search" id="blogSearch" placeholder="Search articles…" oninput="filterBlog()"/>
      <button class="blog-filter active" onclick="filterCat(this,'all')">All</button>
      <button class="blog-filter" onclick="filterCat(this,'economics')">Economics</button>
      <button class="blog-filter" onclick="filterCat(this,'data')">Data</button>
      <button class="blog-filter" onclick="filterCat(this,'r')">R / Quarto</button>
    </div>

    <div class="blog-grid" id="blogGrid">
      <div class="blog-card" data-cat="economics" onclick="openPost('edible-oils')">
        <div class="blog-card-top economics"></div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-meta"><span class="blog-cat economics">Economics</span><span class="blog-date">Mar 2025</span></div>
          <h3>India's Edible Oil Imports: HHI Concentration Risk Analysis</h3>
          <p>Using HHI to measure India's import dependency concentration in palm, soy, and sunflower oils.</p>
          <span class="blog-readmore">Read more →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card" data-cat="economics" onclick="openPost('plfs')">
        <div class="blog-card-top economics"></div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-meta"><span class="blog-cat economics">Economics</span><span class="blog-date">Feb 2025</span></div>
          <h3>PLFS Labour Market Trends: 2018–2024 in R</h3>
          <p>Building a reproducible pipeline for the Periodic Labour Force Survey — LFPR, WPR, and unemployment over time.</p>
          <span class="blog-readmore">Read more →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card" data-cat="economics" onclick="openPost('fuel')">
        <div class="blog-card-top economics"></div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-meta"><span class="blog-cat economics">Economics</span><span class="blog-date">Jan 2025</span></div>
          <h3>Fuel Price Data Journalism: Multi-format Quarto Report</h3>
          <p>Petrol and diesel prices across Indian states with Quarto multi-format output (HTML, PDF, Word).</p>
          <span class="blog-readmore">Read more →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card" data-cat="data" onclick="openPost('gst')">
        <div class="blog-card-top data"></div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-meta"><span class="blog-cat data">Data</span><span class="blog-date">Dec 2024</span></div>
          <h3>GST Collections: ARIMA Forecasting &amp; Shinydashboard</h3>
          <p>Monthly GST analysis with ARIMA(2,1,1)(0,1,1)[12] forecasting and a full interactive Shiny dashboard.</p>
          <span class="blog-readmore">Read more →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card" data-cat="r" onclick="openPost('quarto-book')">
        <div class="blog-card-top r"></div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-meta"><span class="blog-cat r">R / Quarto</span><span class="blog-date">Nov 2024</span></div>
          <h3>Building an 18-Chapter Statistics Textbook with Quarto</h3>
          <p>Workflow for a full Quarto Book — custom SCSS, citation styles, data.table chapter, and render debugging.</p>
          <span class="blog-readmore">Read more →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card" data-cat="r" onclick="openPost('esquisse-gwalkr')">
        <div class="blog-card-top r"></div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-meta"><span class="blog-cat r">R / Quarto</span><span class="blog-date">Oct 2024</span></div>
          <h3>esquisse + GWalkR: No-Code Data Exploration in R</h3>
          <p>How drag-and-drop tools speed up EDA before writing a single line of ggplot2 code.</p>
          <span class="blog-readmore">Read more →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §7  MARKDOWN EDITOR
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="editor-section">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">Write</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Markdown Editor</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Write blog posts and analysis directly here. Live preview with full Markdown support. Download as .md or .html.</p>

    <div class="editor-wrapper fade-in">
      <div class="editor-pane">
        <div class="pane-header">
          <span>✏️ Write Markdown</span>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;">
            <button class="pane-btn" onclick="insertMd('**bold**')">B</button>
            <button class="pane-btn" onclick="insertMd('*italic*')">I</button>
            <button class="pane-btn" onclick="insertMd('\n```r\n\n```')">```</button>
            <button class="pane-btn" onclick="insertMd('\n| Col1 | Col2 |\n|------|------|\n| A    | 1    |')">⊞</button>
            <button class="pane-btn" onclick="insertMd('\n> ')">❝</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <textarea id="md-editor" placeholder="Write your Markdown, RMarkdown, or Quarto content here…"></textarea>
      </div>
      <div class="preview-pane">
        <div class="pane-header">
          <span>👁️ Live Preview</span>
          <button class="pane-btn" onclick="copyPreview()">Copy HTML</button>
        </div>
        <div id="md-preview"><em style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;">Preview will appear here…</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="editor-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="downloadMd()">⬇ Download .md</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline" style="color:var(--navy);border-color:var(--border);" onclick="downloadHtml()">⬇ Download .html</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline" style="color:var(--navy);border-color:var(--border);" onclick="clearEditor()">🗑 Clear</button>
      <label class="btn btn-outline" style="color:var(--navy);border-color:var(--border);cursor:pointer;">
        ⬆ Upload .md / .qmd / .Rmd
        <input type="file" accept=".md,.qmd,.rmd,.Rmd,.txt" style="display:none" onchange="uploadMd(event)"/>
      </label>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §8  R CODE EXAMPLES
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="r-section">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">R Snippets</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">R Code Examples</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Annotated R code for common tasks in Indian economic data analysis. Click a tab to explore.</p>

    <div class="r-tabs">
      <button class="r-tab active" onclick="showRTab('ggplot')">ggplot2</button>
      <button class="r-tab" onclick="showRTab('datatable')">data.table</button>
      <button class="r-tab" onclick="showRTab('esquisse')">esquisse</button>
      <button class="r-tab" onclick="showRTab('gwalkr')">GWalkR</button>
      <button class="r-tab" onclick="showRTab('quarto')">Quarto</button>
      <button class="r-tab" onclick="showRTab('plfs')">PLFS Pipeline</button>
    </div>

    <div class="r-panel active" id="r-ggplot">
      <div class="r-code" id="code-ggplot">
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="cm"># India State-wise GDP visualization with ggplot2</span>
<span class="kw">library</span>(ggplot2); <span class="kw">library</span>(dplyr)

gdp_data <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">tibble</span>(
  state       = <span class="fn">c</span>(<span class="str">"Maharashtra"</span>, <span class="str">"Tamil Nadu"</span>, <span class="str">"Karnataka"</span>, <span class="str">"Gujarat"</span>, <span class="str">"Uttar Pradesh"</span>),
  gdp_lakh_cr = <span class="fn">c</span>(<span class="num">36.3</span>, <span class="num">22.6</span>, <span class="num">22.3</span>, <span class="num">21.4</span>, <span class="num">21.7</span>)
)
<span class="fn">ggplot</span>(gdp_data, <span class="fn">aes</span>(x = <span class="fn">reorder</span>(state, gdp_lakh_cr), y = gdp_lakh_cr, fill = gdp_lakh_cr)) +
  <span class="fn">geom_col</span>(width = <span class="num">0.65</span>, show.legend = <span class="kw">FALSE</span>) +
  <span class="fn">geom_text</span>(<span class="fn">aes</span>(label = <span class="fn">paste0</span>(<span class="str">"₹"</span>, gdp_lakh_cr, <span class="str">"L Cr"</span>)), hjust = -<span class="num">0.1</span>, size = <span class="num">3.5</span>) +
  <span class="fn">scale_fill_gradient</span>(low = <span class="str">"#9FE1CB"</span>, high = <span class="str">"#0F6E56"</span>) +
  <span class="fn">coord_flip</span>() +
  <span class="fn">labs</span>(title = <span class="str">"Top 5 States by GDP (FY2024)"</span>, x = <span class="kw">NULL</span>, y = <span class="str">"₹ Lakh Crore"</span>) +
  <span class="fn">theme_minimal</span>(base_size = <span class="num">13</span>)</div>
      <div class="r-desc"><p><strong>ggplot2</strong> — Publication-quality bar chart with gradient fills, flipped axes, inline labels, and a teal colour ramp.</p></div>
    </div>

    <div class="r-panel" id="r-datatable">
      <div class="r-code" id="code-datatable">
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="cm"># Fast data.table manipulation — PLFS microdata</span>
<span class="kw">library</span>(data.table)
plfs <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">fread</span>(<span class="str">"plfs_2023.csv"</span>, select = <span class="fn">c</span>(<span class="str">"state"</span>,<span class="str">"age"</span>,<span class="str">"sex"</span>,<span class="str">"status"</span>,<span class="str">"wgt"</span>))
wpr  <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> plfs[age <span class="kw">%between%</span> <span class="fn">c</span>(<span class="num">15</span>,<span class="num">64</span>),
            .(<span class="fn">wpr</span> = <span class="fn">weighted.mean</span>(status == <span class="str">"employed"</span>, w = wgt) * <span class="num">100</span>),
            by = .(state, sex)]
<span class="fn">setorder</span>(wpr, -wpr); wpr[<span class="num">1</span>:<span class="num">10</span>]</div>
      <div class="r-desc"><p><strong>data.table</strong> — <code>fread()</code> with column selection, grouped weighted aggregation in a single chained expression.</p></div>
    </div>

    <div class="r-panel" id="r-esquisse">
      <div class="r-code" id="code-esquisse">
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="cm"># esquisse — interactive drag-and-drop ggplot2 builder</span>
<span class="kw">library</span>(esquisse); <span class="kw">library</span>(data.table)
agri <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">fread</span>(<span class="str">"india_crop_production.csv"</span>)
<span class="fn">esquisser</span>(agri, viewer = <span class="str">"browser"</span>)
<span class="cm"># GUI generates code like:</span>
<span class="fn">ggplot</span>(agri) + <span class="fn">aes</span>(x = year, y = production_mt, fill = crop) +
  <span class="fn">geom_area</span>(alpha = <span class="num">0.6</span>) + <span class="fn">scale_fill_viridis_d</span>() + <span class="fn">theme_minimal</span>()</div>
      <div class="r-desc"><p><strong>esquisse</strong> — Opens a GUI where you drag columns to X/Y/Fill/Facet and export portable ggplot2 code.</p></div>
    </div>

    <div class="r-panel" id="r-gwalkr">
      <div class="r-code" id="code-gwalkr">
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="cm"># GWalkR — Tableau-style exploration inside R</span>
<span class="kw">library</span>(GWalkR); <span class="kw">library</span>(data.table)
hces <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">fread</span>(<span class="str">"hces_2023.csv"</span>)
<span class="fn">gwalkr</span>(hces)           <span class="cm"># Opens in RStudio Viewer / browser</span>
<span class="cm"># Shiny embedding:</span>
<span class="kw">library</span>(shiny)
ui     <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">fluidPage</span>(<span class="fn">gwalkrOutput</span>(<span class="str">"explorer"</span>, height = <span class="str">"600px"</span>))
server <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="kw">function</span>(input, output) {
  output<span class="kw">$</span>explorer <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">renderGwalkr</span>({ <span class="fn">gwalkr</span>(hces) })
}</div>
      <div class="r-desc"><p><strong>GWalkR</strong> — Full Tableau-like explorer in R; works in Viewer, Shiny, and Quarto HTML. Install with <code>install.packages("GWalkR")</code>.</p></div>
    </div>

    <div class="r-panel" id="r-quarto">
      <div class="r-code" id="code-quarto">
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="cm"># _quarto.yml — Book project configuration</span>
project:
  type: book
book:
  title: <span class="str">"R for Statistical Analysis"</span>
  author: <span class="str">"Pawan Jangra"</span>
  date: <span class="str">"today"</span>
  chapters:
    - index.qmd
    - part: <span class="str">"Foundations"</span>
      chapters: [chapters/01-descriptive.qmd, chapters/02-probability.qmd]
    - part: <span class="str">"Regression"</span>
      chapters: [chapters/08-ols.qmd, chapters/09-panel-data.qmd]
format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, custom.scss]
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrbook</div>
      <div class="r-desc"><p><strong>Quarto</strong> — Multi-format book publishing. One source renders HTML (website), PDF (LaTeX), and Word with code folding and TOC.</p></div>
    </div>

    <div class="r-panel" id="r-plfs">
      <div class="r-code" id="code-plfs">
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)">Copy</button><span class="cm"># Complete PLFS multi-year pipeline in R</span>
<span class="kw">library</span>(data.table); <span class="kw">library</span>(ggplot2); <span class="kw">library</span>(ggiraph)
years    <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="num">2018</span>:<span class="num">2024</span>
plfs_all <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">rbindlist</span>(<span class="fn">lapply</span>(years, <span class="kw">function</span>(y) {
  dt <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">fread</span>(<span class="fn">paste0</span>(<span class="str">"data/plfs_"</span>, y, <span class="str">".csv"</span>))
  dt[, year := y]
}))
lfpr <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> plfs_all[age <span class="kw">%between%</span> <span class="fn">c</span>(<span class="num">15</span>,<span class="num">64</span>),
  .(<span class="fn">lfpr</span> = <span class="fn">weighted.mean</span>(in_lf, wgt) * <span class="num">100</span>), by = .(year, sector)]
p <span class="kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="fn">ggplot</span>(lfpr, <span class="fn">aes</span>(year, lfpr, color = sector)) +
  <span class="fn">geom_line_interactive</span>(<span class="fn">aes</span>(tooltip = <span class="fn">paste0</span>(sector,<span class="str">": "</span>,<span class="fn">round</span>(lfpr,<span class="num">1</span>),<span class="str">"%"</span>), data_id = sector),
                         linewidth = <span class="num">1.5</span>) +
  <span class="fn">scale_color_manual</span>(values = <span class="fn">c</span>(<span class="str">"Rural"</span>=<span class="str">"#1D9E75"</span>, <span class="str">"Urban"</span>=<span class="str">"#BA7517"</span>)) +
  <span class="fn">labs</span>(title = <span class="str">"India LFPR Trends 2018–2024"</span>) + <span class="fn">theme_minimal</span>()
<span class="fn">girafe</span>(ggobj = p)</div>
      <div class="r-desc"><p><strong>PLFS Pipeline</strong> — Stack survey years with <code>rbindlist()</code>, compute weighted LFPR, render interactive <code>ggiraph</code> charts for Quarto HTML reports.</p></div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     §9  CONTACT
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="section-label">Get in Touch</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Let's Work Together</h2>
    <div class="contact-grid fade-in">
      <div class="contact-info">
        <p>I'm available for freelance research services — field surveys, data analysis, visualisation, and web scraping. Based in New Delhi, working with clients across India and internationally.</p>
        <div class="c-links">
          <a href="https://github.com/pawan1198" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="c-link">
            <div class="c-link-icon">⌥</div>
            <div class="c-link-text">GitHub <span class="c-link-sub">github.com/pawan1198</span></div>
          </a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pawanjangra1198/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="c-link">
            <div class="c-link-icon" style="background:#0077b5;">in</div>
            <div class="c-link-text">LinkedIn <span class="c-link-sub">pawanjangra1198</span></div>
          </a>
          <a href="mailto:pawanjangra1198@gmail.com" class="c-link">
            <div class="c-link-icon" style="background:#ea4335;">@</div>
            <div class="c-link-text">Email <span class="c-link-sub">pawanjangra1198@gmail.com</span></div>
          </a>
          <a href="https://pawan1198.github.io/portfolio/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="c-link">
            <div class="c-link-icon" style="background:#7f77dd;">↗</div>
            <div class="c-link-text">Portfolio <span class="c-link-sub">pawan1198.github.io/portfolio</span></div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-form">
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group"><label>Name</label><input type="text" id="f-name" placeholder="Your name"/></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>Email</label><input type="email" id="f-email" placeholder="your@email.com"/></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Service</label>
          <select id="f-service">
            <option value="">Select a service…</option>
            <option>Field Survey</option>
            <option>Data Analysis (R / Python)</option>
            <option>Data Visualisation</option>
            <option>Quarto Report / Book</option>
            <option>Web Scraping</option>
            <option>Research Collaboration</option>
            <option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Message</label>
          <textarea id="f-msg" placeholder="Tell me about your project…"></textarea>
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="submitForm()">Send Message</button>
        <div id="form-msg"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     BLOG POST MODAL
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="blogModal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h2 id="modal-title">Post Title</h2>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="modal-body"></div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>
      <a href="https://pawan1198.github.io/portfolio/blog.html" target="_blank"
         class="btn btn-outline" style="color:var(--navy);border-color:var(--border);">Full Blog →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FOOTER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2025 Pawan Jangra ·
    Built with <a href="https://quarto.org" target="_blank">Quarto</a> &amp; R ·
    <a href="https://pawan1198.github.io/portfolio/">Portfolio</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/pawan1198" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
  </p>
</footer>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     JAVASCRIPT  (all interactive behaviour)
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
'use strict';

/* ── SCROLL PROGRESS ── */
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const p   = document.getElementById('progress');
  const pct = (window.scrollY / (document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100;
  if (p) p.style.width = Math.min(pct, 100) + '%';
  const bt = document.getElementById('backtop');
  if (bt) bt.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 400);
}, { passive: true });

/* ── FADE-IN OBSERVER ── */
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

/* ── SKILL BAR OBSERVER ── */
const skillObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) {
      e.target.style.width = e.target.dataset.w + '%';
      skillObs.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.3 });
document.querySelectorAll('.skill-fill[data-w]').forEach(el => skillObs.observe(el));

/* ── MARKDOWN EDITOR ── */
const mdEditorEl  = document.getElementById('md-editor');
const mdPreviewEl = document.getElementById('md-preview');

function parseMd(text) {
  if (!text) return '';
  return text
    .replace(/```(\w*)\n([\s\S]*?)```/gm, (_, lang, code) =>
      `<pre><code class="lang-${lang}">${code.replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;')}</code></pre>`)
    .replace(/`([^`\n]+)`/gm,    '<code>$1</code>')
    .replace(/^#{3}\s(.+)$/gm,   '<h3>$1</h3>')
    .replace(/^#{2}\s(.+)$/gm,   '<h2>$1</h2>')
    .replace(/^#{1}\s(.+)$/gm,   '<h1>$1</h1>')
    .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/gm,  '<strong>$1</strong>')
    .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/gm,      '<em>$1</em>')
    .replace(/^>\s(.+)$/gm,      '<blockquote>$1</blockquote>')
    .replace(/^[-*]\s(.+)$/gm,   '<li>$1</li>')
    .replace(/(<li>[\s\S]*?<\/li>)/g, '<ul>$1</ul>')
    .replace(/\[(.+?)\]\((.+?)\)/gm, '<a href="$2" target="_blank">$1</a>')
    .replace(/^---$/gm, '<hr/>')
    .replace(/(\|.+\|\n\|[-| :]+\|\n(?:\|.+\|\n?)+)/gm, m => {
      const rows   = m.trim().split('\n');
      const header = rows[0].split('|').filter(c=>c.trim()).map(c=>`<th>${c.trim()}</th>`).join('');
      const body   = rows.slice(2).map(r =>
        '<tr>' + r.split('|').filter(c=>c.trim()).map(c=>`<td>${c.trim()}</td>`).join('') + '</tr>'
      ).join('');
      return `<table><thead><tr>${header}</tr></thead><tbody>${body}</tbody></table>`;
    })
    .replace(/^(?!<[hbuoptla/]).+$/gm, line => line.trim() ? `<p>${line}</p>` : '');
}

if (mdEditorEl) {
  mdEditorEl.addEventListener('input', () => {
    mdPreviewEl.innerHTML = parseMd(mdEditorEl.value) ||
      '<em style="color:var(--muted)">Preview will appear here…</em>';
  });
}

function insertMd(txt) {
  if (!mdEditorEl) return;
  const s = mdEditorEl.selectionStart, e = mdEditorEl.selectionEnd;
  mdEditorEl.value = mdEditorEl.value.slice(0,s) + txt + mdEditorEl.value.slice(e);
  mdEditorEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
  mdEditorEl.focus();
  mdEditorEl.setSelectionRange(s + txt.length, s + txt.length);
}

function downloadMd() {
  if (!mdEditorEl?.value.trim()) return alert('Nothing to download.');
  const blob = new Blob([mdEditorEl.value], { type: 'text/markdown' });
  const a = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), { href: URL.createObjectURL(blob), download: 'pawan-post.md' });
  a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
}

function downloadHtml() {
  const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>Post</title>
<style>body{max-width:800px;margin:40px auto;font-family:Georgia,serif;line-height:1.8;padding:0 20px;}
h1,h2,h3{color:#0d1b2a;}code{background:#f0f0f0;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;}
pre{background:#0d1b2a;color:#5dcaa5;padding:1rem;border-radius:8px;overflow-x:auto;}
table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;}th{background:#0d1b2a;color:#fff;padding:8px;}
td{border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;}blockquote{border-left:3px solid #1d9e75;padding-left:1rem;color:#718096;}</style>
</head><body>${parseMd(mdEditorEl.value)}</body></html>`;
  const blob = new Blob([html], { type: 'text/html' });
  const a = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), { href: URL.createObjectURL(blob), download: 'pawan-post.html' });
  a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
}

function clearEditor() {
  if (confirm('Clear editor?') && mdEditorEl) {
    mdEditorEl.value = '';
    mdPreviewEl.innerHTML = '<em style="color:var(--muted)">Preview will appear here…</em>';
  }
}

function uploadMd(e) {
  const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = ev => { mdEditorEl.value = ev.target.result; mdEditorEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('input')); };
  reader.readAsText(file);
}

function copyPreview() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(mdPreviewEl.innerHTML).then(() => alert('HTML copied!'));
}

/* ── R TABS ── */
function showRTab(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.r-tab').forEach(t  => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.r-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  event.target.classList.add('active');
  const panel = document.getElementById('r-' + id);
  if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
}

/* ── COPY CODE BLOCK ── */
function copyCode(btn) {
  const block = btn.closest('.r-code, .code-block');
  if (!block) return;
  const text = [...block.childNodes]
    .filter(n => n.tagName !== 'BUTTON')
    .map(n => n.textContent).join('');
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text.trim()).then(() => {
    btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
    setTimeout(() => btn.textContent = 'Copy', 2200);
  });
}

/* ── BLOG FILTER ── */
function filterCat(btn, cat) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.blog-filter').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  filterBlog(cat);
}

function filterBlog(cat) {
  const q   = document.getElementById('blogSearch')?.value.toLowerCase() || '';
  const act = document.querySelector('.blog-filter.active')?.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();
  const c   = cat || (act === 'all' ? 'all' : act);
  document.querySelectorAll('.blog-card').forEach(card => {
    const catOk    = c === 'all' || card.dataset.cat === c;
    const searchOk = !q || card.textContent.toLowerCase().includes(q);
    card.style.display = catOk && searchOk ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

/* ── BLOG MODAL ── */
const POSTS = {
  'edible-oils': {
    title: "India's Edible Oil Imports: HHI Concentration Risk",
    body: `<p>India imports over 60% of its edible oil requirements, primarily palm oil from Indonesia and Malaysia, soybean oil from Argentina, and sunflower oil from Ukraine/Russia.</p>
           <h3>HHI Analysis</h3><p>Using HHI = Σ market_share², we measured concentration across 8 source countries. HHI &gt; 2500 = high risk.</p>
           <h3>Key Findings</h3><ul><li>Palm oil HHI ~5200 — extreme concentration (Indonesia 85%)</li><li>Sunflower HHI ~4800 — Ukraine war exposed vulnerability</li><li>Soybean HHI ~3100 — more diversified across South America</li></ul>
           <h3>R Code</h3><p>Analysis with <code>data.table</code> and <code>ggiraph</code>. HHI: <code>sum(share^2 * 10000)</code> per commodity-year.</p>`
  },
  'plfs': {
    title: 'PLFS Labour Market Trends: 2018–2024 in R',
    body: `<p>The Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS) is India's primary household survey for labour statistics.</p>
           <h3>Pipeline</h3><ul><li><code>fread()</code> handles 2M+ rows per year</li><li>Harmonised variable names across survey rounds</li><li>Weighted LFPR, WPR, unemployment by state, sex, sector</li></ul>
           <h3>Key Trend</h3><p>Female LFPR rose from ~23% to ~37% — a structural shift driven by rural women entering the labour force.</p>`
  },
  'fuel': {
    title: 'Fuel Price Data Journalism: Multi-format Quarto Report',
    body: `<p>Petrol and diesel prices revised fortnightly by OMCs based on crude benchmarks and state VAT rates.</p>
           <h3>Data Sources</h3><ul><li>PPAC historical price data</li><li>State-wise VAT from state budgets</li><li>INR/USD from RBI</li></ul>
           <h3>Multi-format Output</h3><p>One <code>.qmd</code> source renders to HTML (Plotly), PDF (LaTeX custom environments), and Word — via conditional format blocks.</p>`
  },
  'gst': {
    title: 'GST Collections: ARIMA Forecasting & Shinydashboard',
    body: `<p>84 months of state-wise GST scraped from the GST Council portal using Python Selenium.</p>
           <h3>Analysis</h3><ul><li>STL seasonal decomposition</li><li>ARIMA(2,1,1)(0,1,1)[12] model</li><li>State-level comparison: Maharashtra vs TN vs Karnataka</li></ul>
           <h3>Shiny Dashboard</h3><p>State selector, date range filter, download button, and embedded forecast chart with confidence intervals.</p>`
  },
  'quarto-book': {
    title: 'Building an 18-Chapter Statistics Textbook with Quarto',
    body: `<p>A Quarto Book project in 6 parts — from R foundations to advanced econometrics.</p>
           <h3>Structure</h3><ul><li>18 chapters in <code>.qmd</code> with live R chunks</li><li>Custom SCSS theme, citation CSL</li><li>Dedicated <code>data.table</code> chapter with PLFS examples</li></ul>
           <h3>Debugging</h3><p>LaTeX <code>\\newcommand</code> conflicts fixed with explicit <code>cache: false</code> in chapter YAML.</p>`
  },
  'esquisse-gwalkr': {
    title: 'esquisse + GWalkR: No-Code Data Exploration in R',
    body: `<h3>esquisse</h3><p>Drag columns to aesthetic channels → instant ggplot2 chart + exported R code.</p>
           <h3>GWalkR</h3><p>Tableau-inspired canvas: line, bar, scatter, map, heatmap. Embeds in Shiny and Quarto HTML.</p>
           <h3>When to use</h3><ul><li><strong>esquisse</strong>: quick ggplot2 prototyping</li><li><strong>GWalkR</strong>: sharing EDA with non-R colleagues</li></ul>`
  }
};

function openPost(id) {
  const post = POSTS[id]; if (!post) return;
  document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = post.title;
  document.getElementById('modal-body').innerHTML   = post.body;
  document.getElementById('blogModal').classList.add('open');
}
function closeModal() { document.getElementById('blogModal').classList.remove('open'); }
document.getElementById('blogModal')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (e.target.id === 'blogModal') closeModal();
});

/* ── CONTACT FORM ── */
function submitForm() {
  const name  = document.getElementById('f-name')?.value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('f-email')?.value.trim();
  const msg   = document.getElementById('f-msg')?.value.trim();
  const fmsg  = document.getElementById('form-msg');
  if (!name || !email || !msg) {
    fmsg.style.cssText = 'display:block;background:rgba(216,90,48,.15);color:#d85a30;border:1px solid rgba(216,90,48,.3);padding:.6rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.87rem;margin-top:.75rem';
    fmsg.textContent = 'Please fill in all required fields.'; return;
  }
  fmsg.className = 'success';
  fmsg.style.display = 'block';
  fmsg.textContent = `Thank you ${name}! I'll be in touch at ${email} shortly.`;
  ['f-name','f-email','f-service','f-msg'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = '';
  });
}
</script>
```
